codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly refines all animation timings specified in the feature description. Changes are focused, minimal, and follow CSS animation best practices. All five animation timings were adjusted as described: album-enter reduced to 320ms ease-out, cover-sheen to 1.2s ease-out with subtler opacity, reroll-pulse to more subtle 1.015 scale, skeleton-shimmer to 1.2s ease-in-out, and album-in translate distance reduced for smoother feel.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker encountered backend 500 errors during verification - pre-existing infrastructure issue unrelated to CSS changes. This is noted in handoff as non-blocking.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues: 'Backend returning 500 errors on /api/albums/random - pre-existing infrastructure issue unrelated to CSS changes'

summary: PASS - All animation refinements implemented correctly. The changes follow the preconditions (420ms→320ms ease-out for album-enter, 1.6s→1.2s ease-out for cover-sheen with opacity reduction, subtle reroll-pulse, faster shimmer). Code is clean with 8 insertions/8 deletions in index.css. Lint and build passed. The crossfade between albums (VAL-LOAD-008) is implemented via the album-enter class reacting to key changes in App.tsx - this approach is correct and the timing refinement should make transitions feel quicker but not jarring per the requirement.
